title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech presented new data analytics agent capabilities including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. These tools enable building custom agents grounded in enterprise data and are accessible via Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech presents new data analytics agent capabilities, centered on the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. The video covers building custom agents grounded in enterprise data, which matters for connecting agent workflows to organizational data sources. Key takeaways: ADK and MCP support agent construction, and the tools are accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs including VSCode.
